name: Snorri
description: A magnificent Icelandic horse who does the tölt with great dignity.

name: Buttercup
description: A very round Dartmoor pony with opinions about carrots.

name: Pepita
description: A criollo mare who has never lost a cattle drive.

description: A brumby who was once politely asked to leave a shopping centre.
